name: Starter Kit Alpha
tagline: A crunchy starter bundle for shipping odd little web tools fast.
description:
Starter Kit Alpha is the first placeholder software dump: a compact web app foundation with file structure notes, UI primitives, and deploy notes.

Use it as a test product while the real repos are prepared. The download is a small placeholder ZIP so checkout, receipt, purchase ID access, and signed downloads can be verified end-to-end.
